positive: Minimalist design featuring a stylized, abstract celestial creature, combining elements of a crescent moon, a graceful winged lion, and flowing nebula smoke. The creature should have sharp, clean silhouettes and deep, velvety contrast against a clean background. Use a palette of deep indigo, cosmic sapphire, brilliant gold leaf accents, and soft lavender. Composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a front-and-center chest print on dark fabric. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern sacred geometry, rendered with clean, vector-like lines and ethereal watercolor gradients. High detail, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, low resolution, fuzzy, extra limbs, messy, dirty background, clutter, photorealistic, 3d render
